qa_pairs.question: Which staff members have details exactly matching Eladio and are linked to any claims documents they created?

SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN claims_documents ON staff.staff_id = claims_documents.created_by_staff_id
WHERE staff.staff_details = 'Eladio'
